nasb.text: The son of Ulam was Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh.

esv.text: The son of Ulam: Bedan. These were the sons of Gilead the son of Machir, son of Manasseh.

cnv.text: 烏蘭的兒子是比但。這都是基列的子孫；基列是瑪吉的兒子，瑪吉是瑪拿西的兒子。

ccb.text: 乌兰的儿子是比但。这些都是基列的子孙。基列是玛吉的儿子，玛吉是玛拿西的儿子。
